description_long: This is a small cowshed structure with a prominent blue gable roof made of corrugated metal or tile, supported by wooden beams. The walls are constructed from gray stone or concrete blocks, giving it a sturdy and rustic appearance. One side features a rectangular window with a simple wooden frame, while the front is open, revealing a wooden bench and some hanging tools or equipment. The roof overhangs the open front, providing shelter for both animals and equipment. The overall design is utilitarian, with exposed wooden supports and minimal decorative elements. The shed appears weathered, suggesting it is well-used and functional in an agricultural or semi-urban setting.
description: A small, rustic cowshed with a blue gable roof, stone block walls, and an open front with a wooden bench and tools. The structure is sturdy and utilitarian, suitable for sheltering livestock or equipment.
description_view_0: The gable roof and open front are visible, showing the wooden support beams and a glimpse of the interior bench and tools.
description_view_1: The full length of the blue roof is seen from above, with the open front and bench clearly visible beneath the overhang.
description_view_2: The side wall with a single rectangular window is prominent, along with the blue roof and wooden framing.
description_view_3: The rear of the cowshed is shown, featuring a solid stone block wall with no openings and the blue roof overhead.
attribute_window_presence: one rectangular window on the side wall
attribute_ventilation_features: open front, no additional visible ventilation features
